meta.title: How I Make Cinematic AI Videos Using Higgsfield Cinema Studio
meta.description:
AI Filmmaking Tutorial with Higgsfield Cinema Studio 
Try Higgsfield Cinema Studio 👉 https://higgsfield.ai?fpr=dankieft&fp_sid=cs

In this video I breakdown how to make Cinematic AI videos. You can also call this AI FIlmmaking. For this video we’re using Higgsfield AI, because it has recently launched higgsfield cinema studio. This tool is so great at making AI videos that we have to look into it. It can help you with your images, videos and prompts to turn it into a complete cinematic looking video.

Join my FREE community where you can find my prompts, GPT  & chat AI
👉 https://www.skool.com/nextgenai


📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
